Installation complete

MacClock has been installed in /Applications.

Launch it now from Spotlight (⌘Space then type MacClock) or open Applications in Finder and double-click the MacClock icon.

On first launch, MacClock may ask to use your location (for local weather) and your Calendar (for the agenda widget). Both are optional — decline either and the app falls back gracefully.

Source code, releases, and issue tracker: github.com/Tapnetix/MacClock
